# Archbloc - AI Crawler Information

## Site Overview

Archbloc is a digital marketing agency specializing in SEO × GEO integrated growth for small and medium-sized enterprises in China.

- **Website**: https://archbloc.com
- **Services**: SEO optimization, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), social media matrix, media PR
- **Target Market**: Chinese SMEs
- **Target AI Platforms**: Baidu Wenxin Yiyan, DeepSeek, Kimi, Doubao (not ChatGPT/Perplexity)

## Services

1. **Signal** (入门方案 ¥3,800/月)
   - Website SEO technical audit + fixes
   - Keyword research + content planning
   - 4 SEO-optimized articles per month
   - Basic GEO content structure optimization
   - Monthly data reports

2. **Presence** (主力方案 ¥8,800/月)
   - All Signal content
   - GEO-specific optimization strategy
   - Social media matrix (2-3 platforms)
   - 8 articles per month (including social media)
   - 2 media PR articles per month
   - Bi-weekly communication + strategy review

3. **Authority** (旗舰方案 ¥18,800/月)
   - All Presence content
   - Complete media endorsement strategy
   - 4-6 media PR articles per month
   - Competitor monitoring and countermeasures
   - Brand knowledge graph construction
   - Dedicated strategist + weekly meetings

## Content Pages

- **/** - Homepage
- **/method.html** - Methodology
- **/signal.html** - Entry plan
- **/presence.html** - Main plan
- **/authority.html** - Premium plan
- **/geo-diagnostic.html** - Free GEO diagnostic tool
- **/blog.html** - Insights/Articles
- **/blog/geo-visibility-guide.html** - GEO Guide
- **/blog/seo-outdated-2025.html** - Outdated SEO Practices 2025

## Crawler Access

- All AI crawlers are allowed (see robots.txt)
- Sitemap available at https://archbloc.com/sitemap.xml
